desc: A religious leader provides a detailed discourse on various spiritual teachings to devotees and encourages them to lead a faithful life.

title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host talks about India's different customs and traditions. He explains how people celebrate in various states. Learn about India's rich cultural diversity. Enjoy the journey.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

desc: The show follows Krishna from birth to Dwarka, his battles and miracles, his love with gopis, and his role in Mahabharata, ending with Bhagavad G

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: In the hospital, police ask Poonam about her injuries. After a while, she reveals Viren beat her and it was not an accident, shocking everyone.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet, a sharp journalist, and Raghav, a moody man, marry under the traditional 'Aata Sata' custom out of love for siblings. Can obligation become genuine love?

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha admits to Madhav that she will not be able to marry him. So, Madhav tells Chandrika that he cannot marry a maid, to save Vasudha.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha, a Mumbai fashion writer and photographer, learns her husband's affair; urged to explore freedom, she befriends Nihar, daughter's artist friend, reshaping life and love.

title: Meet
desc: Meet makes Babita realise that Anubha can take care of her at her maternal house and Babita apologises. Later, Meet Ahlawat's photographer friend, Tanya, arrives and takes him with her.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Dadi chides AJ for scolding Guddan, but AJ tells her that he did it so no one else gets a chance to reproach her. Later, when the 'puja' begins, Rawat plots against AJ, but Guddan foils his plans.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Choti Guddan, who wants to revive her father, AJ's, restaurant, crosses path with Pushpa Birla who aims to destroy the former by any means, including using her own son Agastya for her evil purposes.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
